step_rationale: Antithrombotic endothelial regulator; genetic variation associated with CAD; active on valve cusps during endothelial activation.
mechanism: PROCR encodes the endothelial protein C receptor, an antithrombotic and anti-inflammatory regulator whose expression is altered during endothelial dysfunction and plaque destabilization.

references.title: Targeted gene expression analysis of human deep veins.
references.journal: Journal of vascular surgery. Venous and lymphatic disorders
